name: psychquant-claude-plugins
description: Che Cheng's Claude Code Plugin Marketplace - 學術研究與生產力工具

plugins.name: mcp-tools
plugins.description: MCP Server 開發工具集：mcp-new-app、mcp-deploy、mcp-install、mcp-upgrade、mcp-clone、mcp-publish、mcp-sync、mcp-diagnose、mcp-debug、mcp-test、mcp-to-plugin、mcp-issue

plugins.name: plugin-tools
plugins.description: Claude Code Plugin 完整生命週期工具：plugin-create、plugin-upgrade、plugin-deploy、plugin-update、plugin-health、plugin-debug. v1.15.0: README Freshness Gate 從 3 信號擴展到 6（新增 component inventory drift / tool count drift / version history multi-version gap）+ 2 suppressions（no-version-section / wrapper-only commits）— 從跨 28 plugin 大規模 audit 萃取的盲點。

plugins.name: issue-driven-dev
plugins.description: Issue-driven development methodology: idd-issue → idd-diagnose → idd-implement → idd-verify → idd-close with enforced checklist + semantic gates. v2.32.0: TWO new rules closing real-world workflow gaps observed in PsychQuant/contact-book#96. (1) NEW rules/tagging-collaborators.md — mandatory 5-step protocol when any IDD skill posts @-mention to GitHub: detect intent (--mention <login> flag or natural-language 'tag X' / 'ping X' / '通知 X') → fetch real list (gh api repos/$REPO/collaborators + org members for org repos; training-data / chat-history / git-log handles forbidden) → fuzzy match against login + name field → AskUserQuestion fallback for 0/2+ matches with the actual list → grep + verify all @\w+ tokens pre-post (abort on unverified). idd-issue + idd-comment gain --mention <login>[,<login>...] flag; idd-diagnose / idd-implement / idd-verify / idd-close enforce via prose detection. (2) NEW rules/spectra-bridge.md — bridge contract for IDD skills called mid-spectra-discuss: detection signals (--resume-spectra flag, --source contains spectra-discuss, spectra list shows in-flight, .claude/state/idd-bridge.json exists) trigger SPECTRA_BRIDGE_ACTIVE. Bookmark schema preserves verbatim spectra_topic + issue_url + open_questions[] + idd_action_url + next_step_hint. Final 'Resume spectra-discuss' prompt block printed at skill exit so user can paste back without losing context. Hard rule: never auto-invoke /spectra-discuss; user controls pacing. idd-comment is first skill with full implementation (Step 0.7 detect, Step 7 bookmark + resume); idd-issue / idd-edit will gain it next. No breaking changes — new flags opt-in, prose detection only fires when @xxx tokens present. v2.31.1: docs polish — README idd-all row mentions v2.28 unattended SDD chain; new Implementation Composability section explains --with-skill / --extra flags as first-class feature; CLAUDE.md adds idd-config row + idd-all v2.28 annotation. No code change. v2.31.0: NEW idd-config skill — independent entry point for `.claude/issue-driven-dev.local.json` lifecycle. Four subcommands: `show` (default, prints resolved target + cwd-aware predicate trace), `init` (interactive first-time setup, equivalent to idd-issue Step 0.5.E fork-aware detection but without forcing an issue creation), `validate` (JSON schema + repo existence + predicate-key sanity), `which` (dry-run resolution at cwd, optionally with --title/--label to evaluate content predicates). Closes the long-standing gap where setup / inspection / monorepo predicate debugging was only available as a side effect of `idd-issue` Step 0.5. Backward compatible: `idd-issue` Step 0.5.E still works for users who prefer creating their first issue right away. v2.30.0: (1) idd-issue gains explicit data-preservation HARD RULE — all source attachments uploaded to attachments release by default without asking; new Source Type Adapter table covers .docx / .pdf / Telegram / Apple Mail / Notes / pasted text + dedicated Telegram fallback flow when MCP lacks download_file (lists each attachment with timestamp/sender/caption and asks user to save to specific paths). Step 4 renamed from '附加圖片（如果有）' to '附加所有原始素材（鐵律：預設全保留）' with violation checklist. Closes a recurring gap where Telegram-sourced issues silently dropped attachments because asking-by-default was the safer-but-wrong fallback (see kiki830621/collaboration_gukai#5 SNQ PDF + 2 timeline images). (2) idd-implement gains --with-skill <name> + --extra '<text>' flags for delegating GREEN-phase execution to another skill (e.g., perspective-writer for prose deliverables) and free-text additional constraints. New Step 1.5 Resolve Extra Requirements merges flag values + diagnosis-Strategy auto-detection of '透過 X' / 'via X' patterns. Implementation Plan template gains '### Extra Requirements' section. Step 3 GREEN phase calls Skill(skill=...) instead of direct Edit when with_skill set. Spectra-warranted complexity ignores the flag (spectra-apply has its own sub-skill orchestration). First-class formalization of the idd-implement × perspective-writer integration pattern that emerged in kiki830621/collaboration_gukai#4. v2.29.0: Two-tier gate in idd-close — Step 0 structural gate (v2.17.0+) refuses close on unticked `- [ ]`; new Step 1.6 semantic gate (v2.29.0+) does keyword extraction on each `- [x]` bullet and verifies test/spec/file mentions correspond to real commits/artifacts in #NNN. Three keyword classes: (1) test/regression → must have test-file changes in #NNN commits; (2) spec artifact path → file must exist; (3) backtick file path → must appear in #NNN changed files. Warn-only with AskUserQuestion (proceed/investigate/edit) — keyword extraction has false positives so doesn't hard-refuse. This makes IDD's falsifiability surface a strict superset of TDD ∪ SDD: outcome verification inherited from idd-implement TDD loop and spectra-apply spec conformance, plus IDD-only audit-level semantic check on the close gate. v2.28.0: idd-all SDD path is now an unattended chain — spectra-discuss → spectra-propose → spectra-apply with explicit unattended hints in args that suppress sub-skill AskUserQuestion checkpoints (one-round discuss convergence, no Park/Apply prompt at propose Step 10, no continue-confirmation at apply Step 4). idd-all calls spectra-apply itself rather than relying on propose to chain (propose has architectural NEVER-invoke-apply guardrail). New core principle: 'Unattended assumption' — orchestrator overrides sub-skill attended-by-default contracts via args, not by modifying sub-skills. v2.27.0: PR vs direct-commit path routing in idd-implement (--pr / --no-pr flag, fork-aware default, new pr_policy config field always/never/ask). idd-close gate-checks open PRs and refuses close when a PR for the issue is unmerged. idd-all explicitly enforces PR path. New references/pr-flow.md as canonical contract document. v2.25.0: monorepo + multi-repo support via config-protocol — six-mechanism resolution (per-invocation flag → ask_each_time menu → predicates → cascading walk-up → git remote fallback → orthogonal groups). idd-issue accepts `--target owner/repo` or `--target group:<label>`; sibling skills accept `--repo owner/repo` (idd-comment keeps `--target` for link target). New optional config fields: `candidates[]` (multi-target list with optional `when` predicates: path_contains/path_matches/git_remote_matches/git_branch_matches/title_matches/label_in/type_in/body_matches/priority_in/all/any/not), `groups[]` (multi-repo coordinated issue creation: primary + tracking with bidirectional cross-link comments and tracking_body_mode minimal/full), `ask_each_time`. Two-stage resolution in idd-issue: Step 0.5 evaluates path/git predicates for tentative default; Step 2.5 re-evaluates content predicates after title/labels gathered and prompts to switch if a better match exists. Cascading walk-up follows eslint/tsconfig pattern: first `.claude/issue-driven-dev.local.json` from cwd up to $HOME wins. Backward compatible: configs without candidates/groups/when behave exactly as v2.22.x. See plugins/issue-driven-dev/references/config-protocol.md for full algorithm. v2.22.1 codex pinning + v2.22.0 JSON config + v2.21.0 fork-aware + v2.18.0 bootstrap discipline retained. Commit convention unchanged: (#NNN) or Refs #NNN, NEVER Closes/Fixes/Resolves trailers (they bypass idd-close gate).

plugins.name: che-apple-mail-mcp
plugins.description: Apple Mail MCP server — 44 tools, SQLite 毫秒搜尋, .emlx 解析, 批次操作. v2.6.0: archive-mail 加 YAML frontmatter + .threads.json thread 關係索引，新增 /archive-mail-view 和 /archive-mail-rebuild-threads 兩個 skill. 疊加 v2.5.0 composing tools format 參數 + v2.4.0 搜尋擴展 + Coverage Audit.

plugins.name: che-duckdb-mcp
plugins.description: Swift-native DuckDB MCP + guidance Skill — dual-source docs (llms.txt + full) with TF-IDF search + fuzzy function matching, plus 6 local DB tools (14 total). Pinned duckdb-swift, real DuckDB error messages, SessionStart hook for version check.

plugins.name: che-word-mcp
plugins.description: v3.15.2 closes Bundle A polish from #61 R2 verify (Refs #69 #73 #74 #75): #69 (bug) insert_paragraph append message reports body.children index instead of getParagraphs().count - 1 (mis-reported in docs with tables/SDTs by skipping table children); #74 (bug) insert_image_from_path debug log labels after_image_id correctly (was silently labeled 'index' since v3.15.1); #73 (test) regression pin for equation F5 partial-dict guard (existed since v3.15.1 but was untested); #75 (docs) clarifies '3 insert tools' wording — scope is the 3 #61-target tools (insert_paragraph / insert_equation / insert_image_from_path); insert_caption is a 4th insert tool with its own anchor set including after_table_index, intentionally outside this unification scope. Tests: 194 → 196 (0 fail / 9 skip). No behavior change in normal call paths. No ooxml-swift dep bump (still v0.20.5). Word MCP Server - Swift 原生 OOXML 操作，233 個工具。v3.15.1 closes verify findings F1+F2+F3+F5 from v3.15.0 6-AI ensemble (5 Claude reviewers + Codex gpt-5.5 xhigh)：F1 (P1) `after_image_id` anchor 加到 insert_paragraph + insert_equation (display only) + insert_image_from_path — lib InsertLocation.afterImageId 從 #44 起就 ready 但只有 insert_caption 暴露；F2 (P1) `into_table_cell` 加到 insert_equation (display only) — display equation 是新建 paragraph，cell 放置 well-defined；F3 (P2) equation 成功訊息加 anchor info（'Inserted equation (display mode: true, after text X (instance N))' 等）— 關閉同 v3.14.4 LOOKUP 的 over-claim 模式；F5 (P2) malformed `into_table_cell` partial dict（缺 row 或 col）silent fallthrough → 改回 structured 'Error: into_table_cell requires all three fields'，3 #61-target tools 同步修。Anchor priority unified across all 3 #61-target insert tools (`insert_paragraph` / `insert_equation` / `insert_image_from_path`; `insert_caption` has its own anchor set)：into_table_cell > after_image_id > after_text > before_text > index > append。Inline equation 拒絕擴大 — 現在拒絕所有 4 個 anchor params（before/after_text + after_image_id + into_table_cell）。Tests: Issue61V315PointReleaseTests (9 sub-tests)。Suite 185 → 194 (0 fail / 9 pre-existing skips)。**No ooxml-swift dep bump** — 仍 v0.20.5。Follow-up issues 另開：F4 inline equation 更通用設計 / F6 text anchor 擴及 table-cell 與 block SDT / F7 getParagraphs index mismatch (pre-existing) / F8 error tool-prefix / F9 conflicting anchor warnings / F10 text_instance≤0 normalization。Backward compatible — schema additions optional，既有 v3.15.0 callers 不變，只有 malformed into_table_cell 從 silent fallthrough 改成 structured error + equation message 加 suffix。v3.15.0 closes #61 — insert_paragraph 與 insert_equation 現在接受跟 insert_image_from_path 一致的 anchor 參數（after_text / before_text / text_instance / into_table_cell）。Pre-fix MCP 層 silently drop 這些參數 — JSON schema 接受但 handler dispatch 忽略，呼叫 fall through 到 legacy paragraph_index path 或 append at end。Lib API Document.insertParagraph(_: at: InsertLocation) 從 #44 起就支援所有六種 anchor，本 release 補齊 MCP 側 wire-up gap。Anchor priority mirror insert_image_from_path：into_table_cell > after_text > before_text > index > append。Errors（textNotFound / tableIndexOutOfRange / tableCellOutOfRange）回 structured 訊息而非 silent fallthrough — AI caller 能 surface failure 而非拿到位置錯誤的 misleading 'success'。insert_equation inline mode（display_mode=false）explicitly 拒絕 anchor — 語意模糊（'append OMML run into existing para' vs 'insert new para before/after target'），inline 仍用 paragraph_index。Tests: Issue61InsertParagraphAnchorsSmokeTests (5 sub-tests) + Issue61InsertEquationAnchorsSmokeTests (4 sub-tests)。Suite 176 → 185 (0 fail)。**No ooxml-swift dep bump** — v0.20.5 已有所有需要的 lib API。Backward compatible — anchor params 全 optional，既有 index / paragraph_index callers 不變。**Real-world impact**：thesis-rescue / template-population workflow 不再需要 fall back 到「append at end + 手動 cut/paste in Word UI」，AI caller 對 3 #61-target insert tools 對稱地用 surrounding context 定位。v3.14.5 closes Refs #63 verify F1 P1：擴充 findBodyChildContainingText 涵蓋所有 editable surfaces，補上 v3.14.4 CHANGELOG over-claim 的 insert anchor lookup gap。Pre-fix v3.14.4 只修了 REPLACE path 但 LOOKUP path 只看 para.runs，所以 insert_image_from_path before_text/after_text 對 SDT-wrapped anchor 仍丟 textNotFound。Verify ensemble (5 Claude reviewers + Codex) requirements F1 P1 抓到 CHANGELOG over-claim。ooxml-swift v0.20.5 新增 TextReplacementEngine.flatTextOfContentXML + Paragraph.flattenedDisplayText 擴充 method 涵蓋 runs + hyperlinks + fieldSimples + alternateContents + contentControls (recursive into nested SDT)。findBodyChildContainingText 改用 flattenedDisplayText。Suite 693 → 696 ooxml-swift / 174 → 176 che-word-mcp。Bumps ooxml-swift v0.20.4 → v0.20.5。Backward compatible — strict superset of pre-fix lookup behavior。**Insert anchor lookup gap 此 release 完整補齊** — REPLACE + LOOKUP 兩條 path 在 inline wrappers 全對稱。v3.14.4 修 replace_text 對 inline `<w:sdt>` content control 的 wrapper coverage gap（Refs #63）：Document.replaceInParagraphSurfaces 之前覆蓋 paragraph.runs / hyperlinks / fieldSimples / alternateContents 但 **沒有** paragraph.contentControls — 包在 inline `<w:sdt>` 裡的文字 silently 0-match。外部 converter（pandoc / Quarto / LaTeX→docx）習慣把 cross-ref placeholder（[tab:foo] / [fig:bar] / [Smith 2020]）包成 inline SDT，所以症狀跟 bracketed text 高度相關，但其實 brackets 是 coincidence — bracket-free needle 在 inline SDT 裡也 fail。Issue title「literal `[ ]` brackets」是誤導。Differential test（fldChar / fldSimple / hyperlink / inlineSDT 四個 inline wrapper × 四種 needle）證實只有 inline SDT case 失敗。ooxml-swift v0.20.4 新增 TextReplacementEngine.replaceInContentXML（XML DOM walker，wrap ContentControl.content 在 synthetic root xmlns:w，遍歷所有 `<w:t>` descendants，build flat string + offset map mirror flattenRuns invariant，splice replacements 回 `<w:t>` element string content）+ Document.replaceInContentControl（recursive helper 處理 nested SDT）。設計上跳過：`<w:delText>`（TC deletion text）、`<w:instrText>`（field instruction code）、nested `<w:sdt>` subtrees（避免 double-replacement）。Round-trip discipline：只 mutate `<w:t>` element 的 string content；xml:space="preserve" 與其他 attribute 完整保留。新增 Issue63InlineSDTReplaceTests（3 sub-tests / 18 assertions）+ MCP-layer Issue63ReplaceTextInlineSDTSmokeTests（2 sub-tests）。Suite 690 → 693 ooxml-swift / 172 → 174 che-word-mcp。基於 ooxml-swift v0.20.4。Backward compatible — surgical fix 只新增 code path。v3.14.3 sub-stack E of paragraph-level content-equality (closes #66)：Paragraph 新增 w14ParaId / w14TextId 欄位，提取並 round-trip <w:p> 上的 w14:* attributes（Word 用於 collaborative editing 和 comment threading 的 revision-tracking GUIDs）。Plain attribute passthrough，String? typing。Pre-fix v3.14.2 silently 丟掉兩個 attributes — 佔了 NTPU 論文 fixture w14:* token loss 的 ~95%。Post-E 量測：w14: 保留率 10.55% → 93.98%；document.xml 流失 10.95% → 8.02%。Combined with sub-stack D (#65), total impact since v3.14.1：<w:lang> 50% → 98.89%、w14:* 5% → 93.98%、document.xml 流失 16.66% → 8.02% (-8.64 pp)。Matrix-pin testDocumentContentEqualityInvariant 同步抬升（w14: 0.04→0.90、sizeLossRatio 上限 0.12→0.10）— matrix-pin 現在 LOAD-BEARING across 5 preservation classes spanning run-level + paragraph-level + paragraph-mark scope。Defensive design (R2 review fixes)：openingPTag() escapes attribute values；parseParagraph rejects schema-invalid empty-string GUIDs。基於 ooxml-swift v0.20.3。剩餘 8% 流失主要是其他 w14:* attribute classes（如 w14:* on <w:r>）— separate follow-up SDD。v3.14.2 sub-stack D of paragraph-level content-equality (closes #65)：ParagraphProperties 新增 markRunProperties 欄位，提取並 round-trip <w:rPr> direct child of <w:pPr> — paragraph-mark formatting per ECMA-376 §17.3.1.27 CT_PPrBase（控制 pilcrow ¶ 字符外觀的字型/顏色/語言/字距）。Reuses parseRunProperties verbatim — schema 跟 run-level CT_RPr 一致，所以 sub-stack C 的 typed extraction（rFonts 4-axis / noProof / kern / lang 3-axis）和 rawChildren passthrough（w14:* 效果）全部免費繼承。NTPU 論文 fixture 量測影響：<w:lang> 保留率 50% → 98.89%；<w:rFonts> 88% → 98.77%；<w:noProof> 92% → 100%；<w:kern> 84% → 99.93%；document.xml 大小流失 16.66% → 10.95%。Matrix-pin testDocumentContentEqualityInvariant 同步抬升 floor（lang 0.45→0.95、rFonts/noProof/kern 0.95、sizeLossRatio 上限 0.175→0.12）。Sub-stack E (#66 w14:paraId/textId on <w:p>) 接著 ship 到 v3.14.3，把流失壓到 < 5%，完成「edit 一個字 → document.xml shrinks <1%」strong demo。基於 ooxml-swift v0.20.2。Backward compatible（markRunProperties optional、default nil、writer empty-gate 防止 synthetic empty <w:rPr/>）。v3.14.1 sub-stack C-CONT closes triple-confirmed P0 (R2 + R5 + Codex 6-AI verify)：recognizedRprChildren Set 列了 ~16+ rPr child kinds 為 'recognized' 但 parseRunProperties 沒有 typed extraction → silent drop。受影響的常見元素：<w:spacing>、<w:caps>/<w:smallCaps>、<w:position>、<w:shd>、<w:bdr>、<w:em>（CJK）、<w:effect>、<w:vanish>/<w:specVanish>/<w:webHidden>、<w:outline>/<w:shadow>/<w:emboss>/<w:imprint>、<w:bCs>/<w:iCs>/<w:dstrike>。Fix：trim Set 到 ONLY actually-typed-extracted-or-emitted kinds。Round-trip size loss: pre-fix 32% → v3.14.0 17.75% → v3.14.1 16.66%。v3.14.0 closes #60（sub-stack C of #58/#59/#60）— RunProperties field-loss audit。Bump ooxml-swift v0.19.13→v0.20.0。新增 typed fields：4-axis rFonts、noProof、kern、3-axis lang，加上 rawChildren passthrough 處理 unrecognized rPr children。**Pre-fix MCP 用戶看到 eastAsia/cs 字型（如 DFKai-SB 用於繁體中文）在 round-trip 時 silently 被替換成 ascii 值；v3.14.0 完整保留 4 個 axis**。Matrix-pin testDocumentContentEqualityInvariant 加上 preservation-class-3 ratio-floor assertions，現在 LOAD-BEARING。**'if not typed, preserve as raw' 原則架構性完成** — sub-stack A (#58)、B (#59)、C (#60)、D (#65)、E (#66)。
